user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Alpine Ski House. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-23 17:04 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with migration architecture. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-25 16:45 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-19 13:52 EST
Subject: URGENT: migration architecture Issue at Alpine Ski House

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about migration architecture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: migration architecture Discussion - Alpine Ski House
Date: 2024-03-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is migration architecture.

[00:06:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:10:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:14:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:19:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.
